replies.body:
Task Status: Completed 
Interview round: 2nd
Feedback/ Reason: interview answer quality was good, candidate efforts were also
good, Candidate told me that she is relocated to new location now so internet
connection problem was there but still we managed everything well. Next round is
face-to-face, There is strong possibility of next round.
Asked Interviews Questions:  questions list
What interested you in this particular job as the 1st Line Support Analyst?
Why are you looking to leave your current position?
Can you give us an overview of what you do in your current role and what a
typical day looks like?
You have certifications like MS-900, MS-100, and AZ-900 completed, and you’re
working towards MD-102—can you tell us about that?
Apart from Active Directory and Microsoft 365, are you familiar and comfortable
using other Microsoft 365 admin centers? Which ones?
How do you handle tickets on a day-to-day basis, and what do you think is the
most important aspect?
What do you define as excellent customer service from a help desk?
How do you differentiate between 1st, 2nd, and 3rd line tasks?
How familiar are you with SharePoint, and do you know how to set permissions?
How are you with Mac and macOS?
A user reports their computer is running slow—how do you approach diagnosing and
resolving this?
What is the difference between a public IP address and a private IP address?
A user is unable to access a shared folder they had access to yesterday—how
would you troubleshoot?
What steps would you take if a user reports their laptop won’t power on?
Can you give an example of when using the command line would be more efficient
than the GUI?
A user can access local network resources but cannot browse the internet—how
would you troubleshoot?
A user calls saying they cannot access the company VPN—how do you handle that?
A user cannot log into Office 365 with the Microsoft Authenticator app on a new
phone—how would you help?
How would you give multiple users permissions to a folder within SharePoint?
A user calls saying they received a spam or phishing email—how do you verify it?
What does a DHCP server do?
What would you do if a user account has been compromised or hacked?
How would you handle a customer who is angry or upset on the phone?
If you were to join us, what would you aim to achieve in your first 12 months?
Do you have any questions for us about the position or the company?

tasks.body: Candidate NameSaransh ThakurGenderMaleTechnologyData ScientistEnd ClientMoenJob TitleData ScientistInterview RoundScreeningDate and Time of Interview (EST)Jul 22, 2025 at 5:00 PMDuration30 minutesEmail IDsaranshthakur051998@gmail.comContact Number+1 (669) 260-4308Job DescriptionAre you a passionate and talented AI and Data Scientist looking for an opportunity to make your mark? Leverage your expertise in data science and AI to develop solutions that tackle complex, real-world problems for both internal and external customers. If you thrive in a dynamic environment and want to take ownership over your work, in a mission-driven organization, we would love to hear from you.Position location: Hybrid onsite in Deerfield, IL How You'll Make an ImpactLead and drive the development and implementation of AI/ML models and algorithms to drive innovation across the AI within our water productsCreate the technical strategic vision for data science within water productsCollaborate with business stakeholders and cross-functional teams across the organization to identify and prioritize high-impact use cases for AI/ML applicationsDrive rapid prototyping efforts, focusing on learning from experiments, iterating on solutionsDemonstrate innovative and creative thinking to develop novel AI/ML approaches and solutionsPartner with product teams in order to embed AI/ML model solutions into physical and digital productsConduct in-depth data analysis and feature engineering to extract valuable insights and improve model performanceIdentify key insights from large data sources; interpret and communicate insights from data and analysis to product, service, and business managersPartner with our ML engineering team to design, develop, and deploy scalable and robust AI/ML solutions to solve complex business problems and improve operational efficiencyContinuously monitor and optimize AI/ML models to ensure their accuracy, reliability, and performance in production environmentsStay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI/ML technologies and apply them to drive innovation and maintain a competitive edgeLead projects with both hands-on coding/analysis and thought leadership with a minimum viable product and minimum lovable product mindset leveraging the best technologies and methodologies appropriate for the business need and maturityProactively identify and communicate the challenges, opportunities, risks, and threats associated with project work to ensure the timely completion of the entire productWhat We OfferA dynamic, innovative, and collaborative work environment that fosters creativity and encourages out-of-the-box thinkingOpportunity to work on cutting-edge AI/ML projects that make a measurable impact on our products and to our customersAccess to state-of-the-art technology, tools, and resources to support your work and professional developmentMentorship from experienced AI/ML professionals who are leaders in their field and dedicated to helping you grow and succeedCollaborative opportunities with cross-functional teams, allowing you to expand your skills and knowledge across various domainsContinuous learning and development opportunities, including workshops, conferences, and training programs to keep you updated with the latest advancements in AI/MLFlexible work arrangements that promote work-life balance and support your personal and professional well-beingCompetitive compensation packageBe part of a collaborative, inclusive, and supportive team that values diversity, integrity, and excellenceEnjoy a culture that promotes work-life balance, fosters continuous learning, and celebrates individual and collective achievementsA diverse and inclusive workplace that values and celebrates individual differences and fosters a sense of belonging QualificationsExperience You'll BringMaster's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (we will consider exceptional candidates without advanced degrees)8+ years of hands-on experience in developing and deploying AI/ML models in a production environmentExperience operating as a technical leadStrong expertise in machine learning algorithms, deep learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch), and statistical modeling techniquesExtremely experienced in programming languages such as Python, R, and SQL for data manipulation and analysisExperience with end-to-end feature development (owning feature definition, roadmap development, and experimentation)Experience distilling informal customer requirements into problem definitions, dealing with ambiguity, and competing objectivesExperience with big data technologies (e.g., Snowflake, Google BigQuery) and cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure)Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to think creatively to develop innovative AI/ML solutionsStrong communication and collaboration skills to effectively work with cross-functional teams and stakeholdersProven track record of delivering high-impact AI/ML projects in a fast-paced and dynamic environmentDemonstrated ability to persevere and iterate through solutions in the face of technical challenges and setbacksHands-on experience in building solutions leveraging the latest AI capabilities and advancements, including large language models, generative AI, and other state-of-the-art techniquesAdditional InformationFortune Brands believes in fair and equitable pay. A reasonable estimate of the base salary range for this role is Hiring Pay Range: $130,000 USD - $175,000 USD. Please note that actual salaries may vary within the range, or be above or below the range, based on factors including, but not limited to, education, training, experience, professional achievement, business need, and location. In addition to base salary, employees will participate in either an annual bonus plan based on company and individual performance, or a role-based sales incentive plan.At Fortune Brands, we support the overall health and wellness of our associates by offering comprehensive, competitive benefits that prioritize all aspects of wellbeing and provide flexibility for our teammates’ unique needs. This includes robust health plans, a market-leading 401(k) program with a company contribution, product discounts, flexible time off benefits (including half-day summer Fridays per policy), inclusive fertility / adoption benefits, and more. We offer numerous Employee Resource Groups to support inclusivity and our associates’ feeling of belonging at work.Fortune Brands is a brand, innovation and channel leader focused on exciting, supercharged categories in the home products, security and commercial building markets. Our portfolio of brands includes Moen, House of Rohl, Aqualisa, SpringWell, Therma-Tru, Larson, Fiberon, Master Lock, SentrySafe and Yale residential.Fortune Brands is headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois and trades on the NYSE as FBINEqual Employment Opportunity:FBIN is an equal employment opportunity employer and does not discriminate against any applicant based on race, color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, national origin, ancestry, age, disability, marital status, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, genetic history or information, or any other legally protected characteristic.We are committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace and encourage applicants from all backgrounds to apply. To support our efforts, we invite you to voluntarily share your gender, ethnicity, and veteran status. This information is confidential and helps us ensure an inclusive hiring process and improve our diversity initiatives.Reasonable Accommodations:FBIN is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodation to applicants with disabilities. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application or interview process, please contact us at fbinleave.fbhs@fbin.com and let us know the nature of your request along with your contact information. Resumes submitted to this email address will not be responded to.

replies.subject: Re: Interview Support - Oohasripriya Nandipati - Data Analyst - Jul 23, 2025 at 2:00 PM
replies.body:
Hello Team,
Task Status: Completed 
Interview round: 1st (Might be Final)
Feedback: Initially, she seemed nervous and I tried to discuss with her about
what she could expect in this interview. They started with some behavioural
questions which candidate was able to answer but at some instances, I noticed
she didn't follow the document when the interviewer asked a follow-up question.
I suggested her to stick to it. A SQL exercise was also done in the second half
of the session and all queries were correct and the interviewer asked just one
follow-up that why she didn't use inner join but she was able to handle it even
though I provided the response. This seemed like a first and final round.
Asked Interviews Questions:
* Can you tell me what career accomplishment makes you most proud?
* Who was the audience for the reporting you built? Were they technical or
non-technical? How did you cater your work to them?
* How did you define requirements when working with multiple stakeholder groups
like clinical leadership and pharmacy ops?
* When explaining complex data findings to non-technical teams, how do you
approach that?
* Can you give an example of a time when your data insights led directly to an
operational change or process improvement?
* What challenges have you faced when presenting data to non-technical
stakeholders, and what do you find most difficult in communicating your point?
* Can you elaborate on how you managed a situation where stakeholders had
preconceived ideas about what the data should show?
* How do you personally deal with competing priorities, especially when
member-impacting escalations arise?
* What is something that’s not on your resume that you’d want us to know about
you?
* Would you prefer using DB Fiddle or writing answers directly in the shared
assessment document?
* Why did you choose to use a JOIN versus a WHERE clause in your SQL approach?
* Do you have any questions for us before we wrap up?
Regards,

tasks.body: Candidate NameYaswanth PotnuruGenderMaleTechnology.net Full Stack DeveloperEnd ClientThyssenkruppJob TitleIt Applications Systems DeveloperInterview Round1stDate and Time of Interview (EST)Jul 23, 2025 at 1:00 PMDuration45 minutesEmail IDyaswanthpotnuru119@gmail.comContact Number+1 (513) 888-2668Your responsibilitiesIT Applications Systems Developer for thyssenkrupp Bilstein of America, Inc. in Hamilton, Ohio. Duties include: Develop, enhance, debug, support, maintain, and test software solutions to support logistics processes and initiatives; provide software solutions for SAP-based logistics IT systems and programs, including interfacing with SAP MM, LE, WM, and PP modules, and configuring SAP master data elements, including data mapping and data conversion; connect company logistics system needs with applicable technology solutions, including reading and interpreting logistics process flow documentation and systematically developing software processes to provide specific logistics system functionality; and design, develop, and modify logistics-related programs, objects, and processes, including identifying required resources and communicating system requirements and project timelines to affected parties.Your profileRequirements: Bachelor degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Business Information Systems, or foreign equivalent degree. 2 years of experience in a logistics systems analysis or specialist position in the automotive suspension system industry. Must have 2 years of experience with each of the following: developing software solutions for SAP-based logistics IT systems and programs in the automotive industry, including interfacing with SAP MM, LE, WM, and PP modules, for production and material planning, capacity planning of machinery, packaging management, and shipping and receiving operations; supporting operative logistics processes in the automotive industry, including planning for infrastructure and equipment needs, warehouse management and layout organization, internal transportation with vehicle fleets, transport management with forwarders and overseeing logistics service providers, inventory storage and cost reduction, and implementing 5S and lean management methodologies; developing and implementing new logistics system functionality into SAP systems utilizing BADI, and BAPI to enable external applications to access logistics processes and data in SAP R/3 systems; developing methods of facilitating communications between SAP-based logistics systems and MS Windows devices with Visual Basic .NET; and utilizing LSMW tools to develop methods for bulk transfer and conversion of data from non-SAP systems to SAP R/3-based logistics systems. Apply online at www.thyssenkrupp.com; email bernardo.samaniego@thyssenkrupp-automotive.com with questions. EOE.The [above] is intended to describe the general content of and requirements for the performance of this job. It is not to be construed as an exhaustive statement of duties, responsibilities, or requirements. To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.Your benefitsBilstein has great benefits to offer!A state-of-the-art OE manufacturing plant with a strong focus on safety and cleanliness.Multiple competitive Health, Dental & Vision Coverage options.401K matching program.Paid time off + 13 paid holidays.Paid volunteer hours.Tuition reimbursement program.Gym reimbursement.Company-paid short-term disability and life insurance.Internal growth opportunities.Employee Assistance Program (EAP).Discounted BILSTEIN products.Companythyssenkrupp Bilstein of America, Inc. is a world class manufacturer of suspension solutions headquartered in Hamilton, Ohio USA. thyssenkrupp Bilstein of America supplies products to a wide range of Original Equipment Automotive Manufacturers as well as Aftermarket and Motorsports customers. Our Aftermarket operations are based out of Poway, CA and our Motorsports operations are based out of Mooresville, NC.For decades, the name BILSTEIN has been synonymous with high tech in suspension design, driving comfort, and safety. In order to expand this position BILSTEIN became a division of thyssenkrupp Technologies AG in 1988, and a wholly owned subsidiary in 2005. This partnership has enabled us to continue the BILSTEIN tradition of excellence.ContactWe only accept online applications submitted through the 'Apply Now' button on this job posting. Our business reach spans satellite television service, live-streaming and on-demand programming, smart home installation services, mobile plans and products.Today, our brands include Boost Mobile, DISH TV, Gen Mobile, Hughes and Sling TV.Department SummaryThe In-Home Services field professionals lead all field operations and thousands of technicians across nearly 100 facilities across the country. The Command Center is an organization consisting of five different strategic teams, all focused on optimizing efficiency in the field. This role will have the opportunity to interact with internal and external customers across the country. Accuracy, timeliness and effective communication are expectations for success in the Command Center. A Data Analyst will also have the ability to identify and implement innovative strategies and projects.Key ResponsibilitiesNurture and enhance our relationships with Field Managers, leveraging both quantitative and qualitative insights from data sources across the enterpriseCollect, model, analyze, report, and present large amounts of data with meticulous attention to detailGarner key insights from data and communicate these findings to key stakeholders to help make data-driven decisions. Key technologies include SQL, Python, R, Tableau, Microsoft, and Google suite of toolsLeverage AWS services for data storage, processing, and analyticsEmploy creativity and critical thinking in problem-solving and achieving business goals, using statistical techniques, advanced approaches, and/or new technologiesDevelop and deliver recommendations for continuous improvement to internal and external field management, executives, and other business partnersFoster engagement and excitement around initiatives during presentationsConduct long-term and short-term data analysis focusing on increasing productivity and lowering fixed and variable costs while improving customer experienceSkills, Experience And RequirementsEducation and Experience:Bachelor's Degree with a focus in Business or related field (Business Analytics, Finance, Business Development Economics, Statistics, Mathematics, Education); Master's Degree a plusExperience with SQL, Python, R, Tableau, AWS, Snowflake, and Excel in a business environment requiredExperience manipulating large datasets in a business environment requiredExperience translating data to actionable insights requiredSkills And QualificationsExcellent facilitation skills, strong desire to communicate in all settingsApply objective, analytical, and orderly thinking to the analysis of complex problemsEmbrace the Adventure, willing to take risks, try innovative approaches, be adaptable to change, and learn from failuresDemonstrate Curiosity, strong desire to learn and add value to all aspects of the DISH businessVisa sponsorship not available for this roleSalary RangesCompensation: $63,150.00/Year - $90,200.00/YearBenefitsWe offer versatile health perks, including flexible spending accounts, HSA, a 401(k) Plan with company match, ESPP, career opportunities, and a flexible time away plan; all benefits can be viewed here: DISH Benefits.The base pay range shown is a guideline. Individual total compensation will vary based on factors such as qualifications, skill level, and competencies; compensation is based on the role's location and is subject to change based on work location.Candidates need to successfully complete a pre-employment screen, which may include a drug test and DMV check. Our company is committed to fostering an inclusive and equitable workplace where every individual has the opportunity to succeed. We are dedicated to providing individuals with criminal or arrest records a fair chance of employment in accordance with local, state, and federal laws.The posting will be active for a minimum of 3 days. The active posting will continue to extend by 3 days until the position is filled.

tasks.body: Candidate NameShafwat MustafaGenderMaleTechnologyData AnalystEnd ClientCignaJob TitleData AnalystInterview Round1stDate and Time of Interview (EST)Jul 22, 2025 at 12:30 PMDuration30 minutesEmail IDshafwat3@gmail.comContact Number+1 (856) 796-0284Role Overview:A Cigna Data Analyst primarily works with healthcare claims data, using SQL to query and manipulate databases, and Python for data analysis and reporting tasks. The daily work will vary, but here’s a typical breakdown of tasks:Daily Responsibilities:Data Extraction & Querying (SQL)Writing and optimizing SQL queries to pull healthcare claims data from databases.Ensuring data accuracy and completeness by troubleshooting and validating queries.Creating and maintaining complex database views or reports that are shared across teams.Data Analysis & Reporting (SQL & Python)Analyzing trends in healthcare claims data (e.g., claims processing times, patient outcomes, or provider performance).Using Python (often with libraries like pandas, NumPy, or matplotlib) to clean, transform, and analyze large datasets.Building dashboards or visualizations for reporting using tools like Tableau or Power BI or generating reports through Python scripts.Data Quality AssuranceEnsuring the data extracted is consistent, accurate, and in line with business rules or compliance requirements (e.g., HIPAA).Identifying data anomalies or errors in claims data and coordinating with relevant teams to resolve issues.Collaboration and Stakeholder CommunicationRegular communication with cross-functional teams, such as healthcare operations, finance, or IT, to understand data needs and provide analytical insights.Presenting findings to leadership or other stakeholders, often using visualizations to make complex data understandable.Automation and Optimization (Python)Automating repetitive tasks or reports using Python scripts to save time and improve efficiency.Creating scripts to clean and preprocess incoming data from various sources.Compliance and DocumentationEnsuring that all data analysis and reporting is compliant with Cigna’s internal policies and external regulations (such as healthcare privacy standards like HIPAA).Documenting the data analysis processes and methodologies for future reference. Typical Workflow:Morning: Start the day by reviewing the data requests and priorities, often meeting with team members or stakeholders to align on deliverables.Midday: Extract data from SQL databases, run queries, and begin initial analysis using Python. Review and refine dashboards or reports based on feedback from earlier meetings.Afternoon: Focus on deeper analysis or automation tasks, review findings with leadership, and finalize reports. Address any ad-hoc data questions or issues that may arise.

AMDuration30 minutesEmail IDspolreddy0899@gmail.comContact Number+1 (309) 370-0910A Data Manager at Stone Bank would likely be responsible for overseeing the bank's data systems, ensuring data quality, security, and efficient access. This includes tasks like developing data management policies, implementing data quality controls, and managing data storage and access procedures. The role may also involve collaborating with various teams to support data-driven decision-making. Here's a more detailed breakdown of potential responsibilities:Data Management & Strategy:Developing and enforcing data management policies: This includes creating guidelines for data collection, storage, and usage to ensure consistency and compliance.Formulating techniques for data collection: Ensuring data is accurate, complete, and reliable.Devising and implementing data handling and analysis procedures: Establishing efficient and secure methods for managing and analyzing data.Managing data storage and access: Overseeing the storage and retrieval of data, ensuring it is readily available for authorized users.Developing data management strategies: Continuously improving how data is managed within the bank.Guaranteeing adherence to legal and company regulations: Ensuring compliance with data privacy laws and internal policies. Data Quality and Security:Implementing and maintaining data quality controls: Establishing processes to identify and correct data errors.Monitoring and evaluating information and data systems: Assessing the effectiveness of systems and making recommendations for improvements.Ensuring data security: Protecting sensitive data from unauthorized access and breaches. Collaboration and Communication:Working with various departments: Collaborating with teams like IT, marketing, and compliance to support their data needs.Training end-users on data systems: Providing guidance on how to effectively use data tools and systems.Communicating data insights: Translating complex data findings into actionable information for various stakeholders.Participating in study element team meetings: Contributing to projects that involve data collection and analysis. Technical Skills:Strong understanding of database management systems: Knowledge of how databases are structured, maintained, and queried.Proficiency in data analysis and reporting tools: Skills in tools like SQL, Python, or other relevant software for analyzing and visualizing data.Experience with data warehousing and business intelligence: Understanding how to manage and analyze large datasets for reporting and decision-making. Additional Responsibilities:Managing data files: Overseeing the organization and storage of incoming data files.Contributing to process improvement initiatives: Identifying opportunities to optimize data management processes.Granting user access to data systems: Managing permissions and access rights to ensure data security.Staying updated on data management best practices: Continuously learning about new technologies and methodologies in data management. In essence, the Data Manager at Stone Bank will play a critical role in ensuring the bank's data is accurate, secure, and readily available to support business operations and strategic decision-making

Hello Team,
Hope you all are doing well.

Task Status: Completed 
Interview Round : 1st
Feedback:  The interview went well. The interviewer asked behavioral and
experience-based questions, and also gave a clear overview of the company, team
culture, and how the team operates. The role wasn’t a perfect match for the
candidate’s profile, so the candidate asked about this. The interviewer
responded that they would let him know whether there’s a possibility to move
into a Data Analyst role after 7–8 months on the job. I have shared the relevant
responses in the document that the candidate referred to during the interview.
The candidate also expressed satisfaction with the support provided. Overall,
the feedback from the interviewers was positive.
Asked Interviews Questions:  questions list:
 1.  “Do you wanna run me through your resume?”
 2.  “Why do you wanna leave Uber?”
 3.  “This role isn’t directly related to your background—what interests you
     about it?”
 4.  “What do you want out of your next role?”
 5.  “What do you think you would do really well in your first week here?”
 6.  “Where do you think you would struggle in your first week?”
 7.  “Can you tell me about a tough situation you were in and how you overcame
     it?”
 8.  “Can you give an example of a vague task or incomplete instruction and how
     you handled it?”
 9.  “What do you think is your biggest professional accomplishment?”
 10. “What do you think was your biggest professional failure?”
 11. “What’s your current visa status?”

Best Regards,
